title: Intercontinental (ICE) to Report Q4 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Improved results at Exchanges, Fixed Income and Data Services, and Mortgage Technology segments are likely to aid fourth-quarter results of Intercontinental (ICE).

title: 5 ‘Strong Buy' Stocks With Dividends Expected to Rise This Week

title: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc.: Stability And Dividend Growth For The Long Haul
text: ICE has seen incredibly stable revenues and margins over the years. The company has entered new industries and continues to make strategic investments.

title: Here's Why Investing in Intercontinental (ICE) is Prudent Now
text: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) is poised to grow, attributable to higher interest rate business, growth across financial futures and options complex, and adoption of digital workflow tools.

title: Intercontinental (ICE) December ADV Soft, Q4 & 2021 Solid
text: Intercontinental Exchange's (ICE) soft December volumes reflect lower Financial average daily volumes.
